examples: Martine puts it down to, among other things,soap operas and instalment plans introduced in the 1970s. Both played an important9 although indirect, role in lowering the birth rate.
The final instalment on the loan is due next week.
Upper-bracket taxpayers who elected to pay their tax increase in instalments must pay the third instalment by April 15.
The long-awaited third instalment in the Bioshock series has been delayed until next year.
The first instalment of of Mrs Beeton's Book of Household Management was published in 1861.
